sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41856" key="e)poru/ttw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπ-ορύττω</orth>, <sense id="n41856.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dig into,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸ τραῦμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0532.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ach.Tat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.8</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
